text:
/mn22 /toge /ci2 4 せっかくのハロウィンだってのに
邪魔する奴らは、こらしめないとな！

/mn15 /ci2 1 へへっ、やったな！
よっし、お菓子をもらいにいくか！

/mn1 ここまでみたいだ……
……面目ない！

/mn7 ううっ……
カンペキにやられちまった……

/mn36 おいおい、無理すんなよ！
あとは任せとけっ

/mn22 /toge /ci2 4 It's finally Halloween! But we're still surrounded
by obnoxious idiots in need of discipline...

/mn15 /ci2 1 Heh-heh, we did it! YES!
Time to go get some candy!
/mn1 Looks like this is as far as we go... No fun!
/mn7 Ugh... They got me real good...

/mn36 Hey! Hey! Don't try to be a hero! Leave the
rest to us!
